"package": "com.fairfax.domain", "enabled": true, "bounds": [0, 1994, 1440, 2131], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "First open this coming Sunday!\r\n\r\nOriginally built approximately 1982 as a Caj Amadio show home \"Montville\" is available to those seeking a solidly constructed home located in a quiet cut-de-sac in sensational Woodlea Estate.\r\n\r\nWith rafted ceilings in the main body of the home and a spacious family room at the rear,  the buyer will enjoy the sense of space with the large windows seemingly bringing the garden inside.\r\n\r\nThen there's the bonus large workshop at the rear of the property with a deck and gazebo just in case the paved pergola area isn't enough room to entertain outdoors!\r\n\r\nExtras include:\r\n- Double carport with r/c roller door adjacent the single lock up garage\r\n- Ensuite bathroom has bath and separate shower\r\n- All three bedrooms have built-in 'robes, the third bedroom comes with a large modular desk\r\n- Ample storage areas \r\n- three wall mounted air-conditioning units\r\n- combustion heater in family room\r\n- gas fireplace in lounge", "resource-id": "com.fairfax.domain:id/headline", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [0, 1994, 1440, 2131], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "First open this coming Sunday!

Originally built approximately 1982 as a Caj Amadio show home "Montville" is available to those seeking a solidly constructed home located in a quiet cut-de-sac in sensational Woodlea Estate.

With rafted ceilings in the main body of the home and a spacious family room at the rear,  the buyer will enjoy the sense of space with the large windows seemingly bringing the garden inside.

Then there's the bonus large workshop at the rear of the property with a deck and gazebo just in case the paved pergola area isn't enough room to entertain outdoors!

Extras include:
- Double carport with r/c roller door adjacent the single lock up garage
